name: mcp-server
description: Bridges ONE external MCP server onto the brAIn bus. Each tool becomes its own topic — `mcp.<alias>.<tool>` — so callers wire to capabilities directly without going through a generic `mcp.call`. Status, OAuth, and tools list are surfaced on `mcp.<alias>.status|tools|oauth.required`. Spawned by mcp-config, never by a human.
